title: STEM Instructor
description:
iCode Scottsdale
iCode Scottsdale is looking for motivated, tech-curious instructors who enjoy working with kids and want hands-on teaching experience in coding and STEM. This role is ideal for college students or recent grads who are looking for part-time work during the school year and are willing to transition to full-time hours during the summer.
Schedule & Commitment
Part-time during the school year
Full-time availability required during summer break
Weekday and weekend availability needed, as classes run both times during the school year
Consistent availability is important, especially for summer camps
What You’ll Do
Teach small groups of students (elementary to high school)
Lead classes in coding, game design, robotics, and other STEM programs
Follow provided curriculum while keeping lessons fun and interactive
Support students as they build problem-solving and critical thinking skills
Help maintain a positive, inclusive classroom environment
What We’re Looking For
College student or recent graduate preferred
Willingness to work part-time during the school year and full-time in the summer
Interest in technology, coding, gaming, or STEM education
Comfortable working with kids
Reliable, professional, and enthusiastic
Teaching or tutoring experience is a plus (training provided)
Why Work at iCode Scottsdale?
Resume-worthy teaching and leadership experience
Flexible part-time schedule during the semester
Guaranteed opportunity for full-time summer hours
Supportive team and fun, fast-paced environment
Meaningful work making a real impact on students
